label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this square dance problem. So we have five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner, and throughout the song, they switch partners multiple times. The question is asking who Alice is dancing with at the end. First, let me list out the initial pairings as given: - Alice is with Jamie - Bob is with Patrick - Claire is with Ophelia - Dave is with Melissa - Eve is with Rodrigo Now, the problem describes a series of partner switches. Let me go through each step carefully. The first switch is Dave and Bob switching partners. So initially, Dave is with Melissa and Bob is with Patrick. After they switch, Dave will be with Patrick and Bob will be with Melissa. Let me note that: After first switch (Dave and Bob): - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa (previously Dave's partner) - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Patrick (previously Bob's partner) - Eve: Rodrigo Next step: Claire and Dave switch partners. At this point, Claire is with Ophelia and Dave is with Patrick. So after the switch, Claire will take Dave's partner (Patrick) and Dave will take Claire's partner (Ophelia). So: After second switch
